generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleData
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedData
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance CraneSwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Swing angle measurements from physical crane"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance CraneWindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Wind speed measurements from physical crane"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance CartMovementMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor controlling cart movement of the gantry crane"
]

instance HoistingMovementMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor controlling hoisting movement of the gantry crane"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet at hoist end for container pickup"
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series data storage for crane operational data"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interactive data visualization and monitoring tool"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance EclipseMosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for IoT communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerized deployment of digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance SolidWorks : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD software for creating and maintaining 3D models of physical crane components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo C4Model
]

instance BehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model for self-adaptive control of greenhouse and digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDB, ActiveMQ
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Architectural visualization model for lab-scale gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SolidWorks, Docker
]

instance InfluxDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series data storage for greenhouse DT"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance ActiveMQ : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Message broker for greenhouse DT communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance VirtualMachineImages : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Virtual machine images providing prerecorded datasets for simulation and installation"
]

instance PrerecordedDataset : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VirtualMachineImages
]

instance SimulationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Prerecorded datasets for simulation and installation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PrerecordedDataset
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationService
]

instance RuntimeVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Runtime visualization for indoor air quality management in virus spread prevention scenarios"
]

instance Simulation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation capabilities for indoor air quality management in virus spread prevention scenarios"
]

instance Prediction : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Prediction capabilities for indoor air quality management in virus spread prevention scenarios"
]

instance HistoricalData : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data logging for system analysis"
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal control service for system operation"
    DTDFVocab:provides Prediction
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging service for crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalData
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data visualization service for operational data"
    DTDFVocab:provides RuntimeVisualization
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service for system health"
    DTDFVocab:provides Simulation
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service for scenario analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides Simulation
]

instance GantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system in controlled laboratory environment"
    base:contains CartMovementMotor, HoistingMovementMotor, Electromagnet, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Commands from the Human Machine Interface (HMI) are processed by the Control Application (Python), which uses the Physical Crane Interface to control the physical crane. Specific command types, message formats, validation mechanisms, feedback systems, conflict resolution, and execution confirmations are not detailed in the document."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous Validation Service compares executed trajectory measurements with simulations against an acceptable threshold, with references to publications on continuous validation methods."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT is used for signaling between digital twin services (e.g., Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation). TimescaleDB and Grafana are utilized for data storage and visualization. Network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The system runs all software on a personal computer with containers implemented using Docker. Computational and storage requirements are not explicitly specified, and scalability or cloud deployment details are not mentioned in the document."
]
